enabled.description: Indicates whether the action group is enabled. Set to true to enable, false to disable.

name.description: The name of the action group. This is required and must be unique within the resource group.

short_name.description: A short name or alias for the action group, which is used in alerts.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the action group. Tags are key-value pairs that help categorize resources.

webhook_receiver.description: A webhook receiver block as defined below.

email_receiver.description: An email receiver block as defined below.

sms_receiver.description: An SMS receiver block as defined below.
sms_receiver.type: list(object({name: string, country_code: string, phone_number: string}))

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
